ventureTemplateMeta.name: Content Venture Template
ventureTemplateMeta.description: Venture template for operating content-template as a repeatable content production loop.

name.description: Human label for this content venture

sources.description: Source URLs, topics, or references to monitor

lookbackPeriod.description: How far back each cycle should search

outputTopic.description: Artifact topic label used by content-template

contentBrief.description: Substance brief for the generated content

formatBrief.description: Style and structure brief (tone, sections, voice, length)

blueprint.problem: Turn a repeatable set of sources into consistently useful content artifacts without losing source coverage, style fidelity, or output quality.

invariants.condition: You operate content generation through the workstream template with slug/content ID 'content-template'.
invariants.assessment: Inspect scheduled entries and recent root requests for this venture. The primary templateId must be 'content-template'.
Count successful content-template executions over the last 7 days. Must be at least 1.
